name: agent-lens
description: Time-travel debugger for AI agents — visualize, intercept, and branch agent reasoning in real-time

scripts.start: concurrently -n proxy,dashboard -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/proxy run demo" "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/dashboard run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n proxy,dashboard -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/proxy run dev" "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/dashboard run dev"
scripts.demo: concurrently -n proxy,dashboard -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/proxy run demo" "pnpm --filter @agent-lens/dashboard run dev"
